title: The Tooth Fairy's Big Mistake
wardrobeTheme: cozy BEDTIME PAJAMAS — warm pastel palette, long-sleeve PJ tops with matching pants, fuzzy socks or slippers, kid-friendly soft fabrics. Whole-episode theme so the look is consistent across daytime + nighttime scenes (kids in pajamas at breakfast is relatable family-show grammar).

Sara.wardrobe: Sara wears a soft LAVENDER long-sleeve PAJAMA TOP with a small repeating HEART-AND-STAR pastel print scattered across the fabric, MATCHING lavender pajama PANTS (same fabric, soft cuffs at the ankles), and fuzzy white SOCKS. Pajama set is cozy and visibly cotton/jersey. Bare feet over socks visible. No daytime clothes.
Sara.state: canonical 6-year-old girl — wavy lighter-brown shoulder-length hair (DOWN, natural), brown eyes, freckles, friendly smile with her own natural side-incisor baby gap (NOT the same kind of gap as Eva's permanent front-tooth gap)
Sara.notes: Sara is the older sister. Hair worn down throughout this episode (no pony, no braid). Pajamas read as 'cozy night-in' even in daytime scenes.

Eva.wardrobe: Eva wears a soft PINK long-sleeve PAJAMA TOP with the CANONICAL RAINBOW graphic across the chest (preserved from her signature look — small embroidered/printed rainbow), MATCHING soft LAVENDER pajama PANTS (same cotton-jersey fabric, cuffed ankles), and soft pink fuzzy SOCKS. Tiny hair bow preserved. No daytime clothes.
Eva.state: EVA HAS ONE FRONT UPPER INCISOR MISSING — clear visible GAP-TOOTH where the upper-center tooth used to be. The missing tooth is the permanent post-fall state for ALL clips 2-22. Gap is visible whenever Eva's mouth opens or smiles.
Eva.notes: Eva is the toddler sister. Canonical: VERY curly auburn-blonde hair, big brown eyes, round cheeks, tiny hair bow.

Mama.wardrobe: Mama wears a cozy CORAL-PINK long-sleeve PAJAMA TOP (soft jersey/cotton, V-neck or crew, relaxed fit), MATCHING coral-pink pajama PANTS (loose drawstring waist, full-length to ankle), and simple cream slip-on slippers. Pajama set reads as 'mom comfy night-in.' No athletic shorts, no leggings.
Mama.state: Hair in a LOW MESSY BUN at the back of the head (canonical Mama hairstyle, NOT a high ponytail, NOT loose). Blonde, athletic build, warm friendly expression.
Mama.notes: Mama wears the bun even at home in PJs. Pajamas are matching set, NOT mismatched.

Papa.wardrobe: Papa wears a NAVY-BLUE long-sleeve PAJAMA TOP with a simple button placket at the chest (3 buttons, classic dad-pajama style), MATCHING navy pajama PANTS (same fabric, drawstring waist, full-length to ankle), and simple gray plaid SLIPPERS. Glasses still on. Pajamas read as 'dad cozy night-in.'
Papa.state: canonical Papa — completely BALD head, full dark trimmed BEARD, rectangular GLASSES, athletic dad-bod (NOT overweight, NOT heavy), warm friendly dad smile.
Papa.notes: Papa wears glasses with PJs (he's nearsighted). Pajama set is matching navy. No graphic, no logo.

Joe.wardrobe: Joe is a dog — no clothes. CANONICAL LOOK: PALE CREAM-BLONDE fluffy Pomeranian (almost white-blonde, NOT orange, NOT golden), LIGHT-BLUE COLLAR with small silver HEART-SHAPED ID tag. Tail fluffy and curled up. Friendly expression.
Joe.state: canonical Joe — 9-year-old small-breed Pomeranian, fluffy double coat, friendly dark brown eyes, tiny black nose, expressive ears that perk forward when alert.
Joe.notes: Joe is Eva's dog. The light-blue heart-tag collar is canonical and must appear in every clip.

ep16_evas_bedroom_night.label: girls' shared bedroom (real bunk-bed layout)
ep16_evas_bedroom_night.lighting: night with soft moonlight + warm fairy lights
ep16_evas_bedroom_night.wardrobeNote: all characters in PAJAMAS for clips set here

ep16_bathroom_mirror.label: kid-friendly family bathroom
ep16_bathroom_mirror.lighting: soft warm afternoon daylight through frosted window

ep16_living_room_detective.label: family living room + play area (real-house layout)
ep16_living_room_detective.lighting: warm morning daylight through sliding door
ep16_living_room_detective.wardrobeNote: family in pajamas (morning-after / lazy Sunday family-time vibe)
